zh.lifeSummary: 當John Morrison於1650年8月27日出生在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾時，他的父親James H Morrison22歲，母親Sarah Jane Evans22歲。他於大約1667年與Mary Granville在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1736年2月16日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆隆多德利享年85歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆隆多德利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Morrison于1650年8月27日出生在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾时，他的父亲James H Morrison22岁，母亲Sarah Jane Evans22岁。他于大约1667年与Mary Granville在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1736年2月16日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆隆多德利享年85岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆隆多德利。

nameMeanings.name: Morrison
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: from Ó Muirgheasáin ‘descendant of Muirgheasán’, a diminutive of Muirgheas, a personal name meaning ‘sea valor’.
Scottish: from Gaelic Mac Moireasdain ‘son of Moireasdan’, a personal name cognate with Irish Muirgheasán’ (see 1 above).
Scottish and English: patronymic from the personal name   Morris  .

variants.name: Morson
meanings: English, Scottish and Irish: shortened form of   Morrison  .
English: sometimes a variant of Moorsom, a habitational name from Moorsholm in North Yorkshire. The placename derives from Old English mōr ‘moor’ + hūsum, dative plural form of hūs ‘house’.

variants.name: Morris
meanings: English and Scottish: from Maurice, an Old French personal name introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from Latin Mauritius, a derivative of Maurus (see Moore ). This was the name of several early Christian saints. In some cases it may be a nickname of the same derivation for someone with a swarthy complexion.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muirghis, a variant of Ó Muirgheasa (see Morrissey ).

Welsh: Anglicized form of the personal name Meurig (from Latin Mauritius), which was gradually superseded in Wales by Morus, Morys, a derivative of the Anglo-Norman French form of the name (see 1 above).

variants.name: McCorriston
meanings: Scottish (Wigtownshire): probably from Mac Thoireasdain ‘son of Tòireasdan or Tòrasdan’, a Gaelicized form of the Old Norse name Thórrsteinn ‘thunder stone’. It may also be from a lenited form of Gaelic Mac Moireasdain ‘son of Moireasdan’; see Morrison .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Morrison was born on 27 August 1650, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland, his father, James H Morrison, was 22 and his mother, Sarah Jane Evans, was 22. He married Mary Granville about 1667, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 16 February 1736, in Londonderry, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, at the age of 85, and was buried in Londonderry, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Morrison est né le 27 août 1650, à Aberdeenshire, Écosse, son père, James H Morrison, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Sarah Jane Evans, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Mary Granville environ 1667, à Aberdeenshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 16 février 1736, à Londonderry, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 85 ans, et a été enterré à Londonderry, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Morrison è nato il il 27 agosto 1650 nel Aberdeenshire, Scotland, il suo padre, James H Morrison, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Sarah Jane Evans, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Mary Granville circa 1667, nel Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 16 febbraio 1736, nel Londonderry, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, all'età di 85 anni, e fu sepolto a Londonderry, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: John Morrisonが1650年8月27日にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアで生まれた時，父James H Morrisonは22歳，母Sarah Jane Evansは22歳であった。約1667年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアでMary Granvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1736年2月16日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアロクインガムロンドンデリーで85歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアロクインガムロンドンデリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Morrison(이)가 1650년 8월 27일 스컷랜드 압르디실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James H Morrison(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah Jane Evans(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1667년 스컷랜드 압르디실르에서 Mary Granville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1736년 2월 16일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 런도더리에서 85세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 런도더리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Morrison nasceu em 27 de agosto de 1650, em Aberdeenshire, Scotland, seu pai, James H Morrison, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Jane Evans, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Granville aproximadamente 1667, em Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 16 de fevereiro de 1736, em Londonderry, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, com 85 anos, e foi sepultado em Londonderry, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Morrison родился 27 августа 1650 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени James H Morrison было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Sarah Jane Evans, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Granville около 1667 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 16 февраля 1736 г. в местности лондондирри, роккингхам, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 85 лет и был похоронен в местности лондондирри, роккингхам, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Morrison nació el 27 de agosto de 1650, en Aberdeenshire, Scotland, su papá, James H Morrison, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Sarah Jane Evans, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Mary Granville aproximadamente 1667, en Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 16 de febrero de 1736, en Londonderry, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, a la edad de 85 años, y fue sepultado en Londonderry, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America.
